key.name: toggle-spotlight
key.description: Modifier combination that keeps the spotlight visible while held down.

key.name: focus-width
key.description: Width in pixels of the undimmed area around the pointer.

key.name: focus-height
key.description: Height in pixels of the undimmed area around the pointer.

key.name: dim-opacity
key.description: Opacity percentage for the dark overlay.

key.name: edge-softness
key.description: Width in pixels of the soft transition around the spotlight area.
